Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Now then, about the new arrival from the other day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I'd like to ask... that you perform a full autopsy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}If we find any distinctive features, we may be able to locate her family. Also...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I can't help but think that the Kirijo Group is connected to Strega in some way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Considering this, I think it would be disrespectful to sweep her death under the rug.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}And of course, I'll take full responsibility—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But judging by the postmortem, we were certain she was—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I'm sorry, but please keep this strictly confidential until we know more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}If there are any other changes... Yes, absolutely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I guess we'll just have to wait and see what happens for now.[n]{f 1 1}
